ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_data" (
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the energy data */,
  "baseline" REAL /* Baseline energy consumption */,
  "weighted_benchmark" REAL /* Weighted benchmark energy consumption */,
  "benchmark" REAL /* Benchmark energy consumption */,
  "variance" REAL /* Variance in energy consumption */,
  "epdm_usa" REAL /* EPDM USA energy consumption */,
  "carbon_black_china" REAL /* Carbon Black CHINA energy consumption */,
  "energy" REAL /* Total energy consumption */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy type */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, report) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy type (e.g., EPDM USA, Carbon Black CHINA) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy type */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the energy type data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "energy_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy data the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_energy_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "energy_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy data the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum for data integrity verification */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_energy_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "energy_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the energy data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the energy data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_energy_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "energy_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy data the trend belongs to */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_trends_energy_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_trends_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "carbon_emissions" (
  "emission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emission */,
  "energy_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy data the emission belongs to */,
  "emission_date" TEXT /* Date of the emission */,
  "emission_value" REAL /* Value of the emission */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the region */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the energy type */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the emission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_emissions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_emissions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES energy_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_carbon_emissions_energy_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_energy_data" (
  "region_energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region energy data */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region the energy data belongs to */,
  "energy_data_id" TEXT /* ID of the energy data */,
  "region_energy_date" TEXT /* Date of the region energy data */,
  "region_energy_value" REAL /* Value of the region energy data */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., sensor, report) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the region energy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_energy_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_energy_data_energy_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("energy_data_id") REFERENCES energy_data ("date")
)
